name: CmsIdsNtnlProvExtr

text.value: WITH cte0 AS (SELECT * FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[CmsIdsNtnlProvExtr_TMP]), cte1 AS (SELECT CASE WHEN t.NPI IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(t.NPI))<10 THEN 'N' WHEN ISNUMERIC(t.NPI)=1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS svNPIChk, t.* FROM cte0 t), cte2 AS (SELECT CASE WHEN c1.NPI IS NULL THEN '' ELSE c1.NPI END AS NTNL_PROV_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd} AS SRC_SYS_CD, CASE WHEN c1.ENTITY_TYPE_CODE IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE c1.ENTITY_TYPE_CODE END AS ENTITY_TYPE_CODE, CASE WHEN c1.PROVIDER_GENDER_CODE IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE c1.PROVIDER_GENDER_CODE END AS PROVIDER_GENDER_CODE, CASE WHEN c1.IS_SOLE_PROPRIETOR IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE c1.IS_SOLE_PROPRIETOR END AS IS_SOLE_PROPRIETOR, CASE WHEN c1.NPI_DEACTIVATION_REASON_CODE IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE c1.NPI_DEACTIVATION_REASON_CODE END AS NPI_DEACTIVATION_REASON_CODE, CASE WHEN c1.NPI_DEACTIVATION_DATE IS NULL THEN '2199-12-31' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TRY_CONVERT(DATE, c1.NPI_DEACTIVATION_DATE, 101), 23) END AS NTNL_PROV_DCTVTN_DT, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_ENUMERATION_DATE IS NULL THEN '1753-01-01' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TRY_CONVERT(DATE, c1.PROV_ENUMERATION_DATE, 101), 23) END AS NTNL_PROV_ENMRTN_DT, CASE WHEN c1.NPI_REACTIVATION_DATE IS NULL THEN '1753-01-01' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TRY_CONVERT(DATE, c1.NPI_REACTIVATION_DATE, 101), 23) END AS NTNL_PROV_RCTVTN_DT, CASE WHEN c1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE IS NULL THEN '1753-01-01' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TRY_CONVERT(DATE, c1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 101), 23) END AS NTNL_PROV_SRC_LAST_UPDT_DT, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_CREDENTIAL_TEXT IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_CREDENTIAL_TEXT)) END AS NTNL_PROV_CRDTL_TX, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_FIRST_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_FIRST_NAME)) END AS NTNL_PROV_FIRST_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_LAST_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_LAST_NAME)) END AS NTNL_PROV_LAST_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_MIDDLE_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_MIDDLE_NAME)) END AS NTNL_PROV_MID_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_NAME_PREFIX_TEXT IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_NAME_PREFIX_TEXT)) END AS NTNL_PROV_NM_PFX_TX, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_NAME_SUFFIX_TEXT IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_NAME_SUFFIX_TEXT)) END AS NTNL_PROV_NM_SFX_TX, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_OTHER_CREDENTIAL_TEXT IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_OTHER_CREDENTIAL_TEXT)) END AS NTNL_PROV_OTHR_CRDTL_TX, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_OTHER_FIRST_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_OTHER_FIRST_NAME)) END AS NTNL_PROV_OTHR_FIRST_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_OTHER_LAST_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_OTHER_LAST_NAME)) END AS NTNL_PROV_OTHR_LAST_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_OTHER_MIDDLE_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_OTHER_MIDDLE_NAME)) END AS NTNL_PROV_OTHR_MID_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_OTHER_NAME_PREFIX_TEXT IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_OTHER_NAME_PREFIX_TEXT)) END AS NTNL_PROV_OTHR_NM_PFX_TX, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_OTHER_NAME_SUFFIX_TEXT IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_OTHER_NAME_SUFFIX_TEXT)) END AS NTNL_PROV_OTHR_NM_SFX_TX, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_OTHER_LAST_NAME_TYPE_CODE IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE c1.PROV_OTHER_LAST_NAME_TYPE_CODE END AS PROV_OTHER_LAST_NAME_TYPE_CODE, CASE WHEN c1.PROVIDER_ORGANIZATION_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROVIDER_ORGANIZATION_NAME)) END AS NTNL_PROV_ORG_LGL_BUS_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_OTHER_ORGANIZATION_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_OTHER_ORGANIZATION_NAME)) END AS NTNL_PROV_OTHR_ORG_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_OTHER_ORGANIZATION_NAME_TYPE_CODE IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE c1.PROV_OTHER_ORGANIZATION_NAME_TYPE_CODE END AS PROV_OTHER_ORGANIZATION_NAME_TYPE_CODE, CASE WHEN c1.IS_ORGANIZATION_SUBPART IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE c1.IS_ORGANIZATION_SUBPART END AS IS_ORGANIZATION_SUBPART, CASE WHEN c1.PARENT_ORGANIZATION_LBN IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(c1.PARENT_ORGANIZATION_LBN)) END AS NTNL_PROV_ORG_PRNT_LGL_BUS_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PARENT_ORGANIZATION_TIN IS NULL OR c1.PARENT_ORGANIZATION_TIN IN('UNAVAIL','<UNAVAIL>') THEN '' ELSE c1.PARENT_ORGANIZATION_TIN END AS NTNL_PROV_ORG_PRNT_TAX_ID, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_FIRST_LINE_BUSINESS_MAILING_ADDR IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(c1.PROV_FIRST_LINE_BUSINESS_MAILING_ADDR) END AS NTNL_PROV_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_SECOND_LINE_BUSINESS_MAILING_ADDR IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(c1.PROV_SECOND_LINE_BUSINESS_MAILING_ADDR) END AS NTNL_PROV_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_CITY_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_CITY_NAME) END AS NTNL_PROV_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_STATE_NAME IS NULL OR LEFT(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_COUNTRY_CODE),2) <> 'US' THEN '~' ELSE c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_STATE_NAME END AS PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_STATE_NAME, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN ISNUMERIC(LEFT(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,1))=1 THEN CASE WHEN LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))<5 THEN NULL WHEN LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))=5 THEN REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ','') WHEN LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))>5 AND LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))<9 THEN LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''),5) WHEN LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))=9 THEN REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ','') WHEN LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))>9 THEN LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''),9) ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS NTNL_PROV_MAIL_ADDR_POSTAL_CD, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_COUNTRY_CODE IS NULL THEN '~' ELSE c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_COUNTRY_CODE END AS PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_COUNTRY_CODE, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_FAX_NUMBER IS NULL THEN '' ELSE c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_FAX_NUMBER END AS NTNL_PROV_MAIL_ADDR_FAX_NO, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_TELEPHONE_NUMBER IS NULL THEN '' WHEN ISNUMERIC(LEFT(c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_TELEPHONE_NUMBER,1))=1 THEN c1.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_TELEPHONE_NUMBER ELSE '' END AS NTNL_PROV_MAIL_ADDR_TEL_NO, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_FIRST_LINE_BUS_PRACTICE_LOCA_ADDR IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(c1.PROV_FIRST_LINE_BUS_PRACTICE_LOCA_ADDR) END AS NTNL_PROV_PRCTC_PRI_LOC_ADDR_LN_1, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_SECOND_LINE_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(c1.PROV_SECOND_LINE_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR) END AS NTNL_PROV_PRCTC_PRI_LOC_ADDR_LN_2, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_CITY_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE UPPER(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_CITY_NAME) END AS NTNL_PROV_PRCTC_PRI_LOC_ADDR_CITY_NM, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_STATE_NAME IS NULL OR LEFT(dbo.trim_default(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_COUNTRY_CODE),2) <> 'US' THEN '~' ELSE c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_STATE_NAME END AS PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_STATE_NAME, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN ISNUMERIC(LEFT(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,1))=1 THEN CASE WHEN LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))<5 THEN NULL WHEN LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))=5 THEN REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ','') WHEN LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))>5 AND LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))<9 THEN LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''),5) WHEN LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))=9 THEN REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ','') WHEN LEN(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''))>9 THEN LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE,'-',''),' ',''),9) ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS NTNL_PROV_PRCTC_PRI_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CD, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_COUNTRY_CODE IS NULL THEN '~' ELSE c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_COUNTRY_CODE END AS PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_COUNTRY_CODE, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_FAX_NUMBER IS NULL THEN '' ELSE c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_FAX_NUMBER END AS NTNL_PROV_PRCTC_PRI_LOC_ADDR_FAX_NO, CASE WHEN c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_TEL_NUMBER IS NULL THEN '' WHEN ISNUMERIC(LEFT(c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_TEL_NUMBER,1))=1 THEN c1.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_TEL_NUMBER ELSE '' END AS NTNL_PROV_PRCTC_PRI_LOC_ADDR_TEL_NO, CASE WHEN c1.EMPLOYER_IDENTIFICATION_NUMBER IS NULL OR c1.EMPLOYER_IDENTIFICATION_NUMBER IN('UNAVAIL','<UNAVAIL>') THEN '' ELSE c1.EMPLOYER_IDENTIFICATION_NUMBER END AS NTNL_PROV_ORG_EMPLR_ID_NO, CASE WHEN c1.REPLACEMENT_NPI IS NULL THEN '' ELSE c1.REPLACEMENT_NPI END AS RPLMT_NTNL_PROV_ID FROM cte1 c1 WHERE c1.svNPIChk='Y'), cte3 AS (SELECT t.NPI, t.ENTITY_TYPE_CODE, t.REPLACEMENT_NPI, t.EMPLOYER_IDENTIFICATION_NUMBER, t.PROVIDER_ORGANIZATION_NAME, t.PROV_LAST_NAME, t.PROV_FIRST_NAME, t.PROV_MIDDLE_NAME, t.PROV_NAME_PREFIX_TEXT, t.PROV_NAME_SUFFIX_TEXT, t.PROV_CREDENTIAL_TEXT, t.PROV_OTHER_ORGANIZATION_NAME, t.PROV_OTHER_ORGANIZATION_NAME_TYPE_CODE, t.PROV_OTHER_LAST_NAME, t.PROV_OTHER_FIRST_NAME, t.PROV_OTHER_MIDDLE_NAME, t.PROV_OTHER_NAME_PREFIX_TEXT, t.PROV_OTHER_NAME_SUFFIX_TEXT, t.PROV_OTHER_CREDENTIAL_TEXT, t.PROV_OTHER_LAST_NAME_TYPE_CODE, t.PROV_FIRST_LINE_BUSINESS_MAILING_ADDR, t.PROV_SECOND_LINE_BUSINESS_MAILING_ADDR, t.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_CITY_NAME, t.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_STATE_NAME, t.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE, t.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_COUNTRY_CODE, t.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_TELEPHONE_NUMBER, t.PROV_BUS_MAILING_ADDR_FAX_NUMBER, t.PROV_FIRST_LINE_BUS_PRACTICE_LOCA_ADDR, t.PROV_SECOND_LINE_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR, t.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_CITY_NAME, t.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_STATE_NAME, t.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_POSTAL_CODE, t.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_COUNTRY_CODE, t.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_TEL_NUMBER, t.PROV_BUS_PRACTICE_LOC_ADDR_FAX_NUMBER, t.PROV_ENUMERATION_DATE, t.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t.NPI_DEACTIVATION_REASON_CODE, t.NPI_DEACTIVATION_DATE, t.NPI_REACTIVATION_DATE, t.PROVIDER_GENDER_CODE, t.IS_SOLE_PROPRIETOR, t.IS_ORGANIZATION_SUBPART, t.PARENT_ORGANIZATION_LBN, t.PARENT_ORGANIZATION_TIN FROM cte1 t WHERE t.svNPIChk='N'); DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[CMSNtnlProv_TMP_CmsIdsNtnlProvExtr]; SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[CMSNtnlProv_TMP_CmsIdsNtnlProvExtr] FROM cte2; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[NPIRejectRec_TMP_CmsIdsNtnlProvExtr]; SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[NPIRejectRec_TMP_CmsIdsNtnlProvExtr] FROM cte3
